code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn has_nonws(_ s: String, _ start: Int, _ stop: Int) -> Bool
  mut i = start
  mut found = false
  while i < stop
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if not is_ws(b)
        found = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  found
end

fn byte_is_nl(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  mut r = false
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      r = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  r
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut last = ""
  mut have = false
  while i <= n
    let at_end = i == n
    mut is_nl = false
    if not at_end
      if byte_is_nl(s, i)
        is_nl = true
      end
    end
    if at_end or is_nl
      if has_nonws(s, start, i)
        last = string.substring(s, start, i)
        have = true
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    println(last)
  else
    println("(none)")
  end
end
